# Is it Unsafe?

> An anonymous, mobile-first web app where women rate how safe nearby micro-locations feel — lighting at night, density of women in the crowd, and overall gut feeling — to help map neighborhood safety.

Built by Midnight Intelligence and TheChange Initiative. No location or user data is stored; ratings are submitted anonymously.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Grant location access and rate the safety of nearby micro-locations.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable list of public routes.
